main_direction: keep depth + camera -> unproject -> render; hold confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask as the current stable local lead, freeze the tested fixed-scale Camera_B1 follow-ups plus the first hard-threshold, first exact continuous, and first softer continuous quality-conditioned follow-ups, and require any future manual question to justify an even softer or reshaped Camera_B1 quality-conditioned rule beyond the frozen whole-foreground linear qmin->qmax scale0.75 variant; default nightly stays steady_hold and cloud stays off
current_cloud_blocker: The stable confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead is still materially worse than baseline on the depth terms (val_loss_conf_depth 0.1181 -> 0.2289 and val_loss_reg_depth 0.1181 -> 0.1760), and the tested continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground quality-conditioned follow-ups still fail the tighter local gate. The first exact linear qmin->qmax scale0.5 rule regressed val_loss_conf_depth from 0.2289 to 0.2776 and val_loss_reg_depth from 0.1760 to 0.1848. A softer half-strength follow-up, linear qmin->qmax scale0.75, also failed promotion: versus the stable lead, val_loss_camera only nudges from 0.0219 to 0.0218 and val_loss_T stays at 0.0003, but val_loss_conf_depth still regresses from 0.2289 to 0.2483 and val_loss_reg_depth still regresses from 0.1760 to 0.1797. The loss path now exposes continuous quality interpolation, so the blocker is no longer missing plumbing; it is that both the first exact and first softer whole-foreground continuous rules still worsen the remaining local depth gap. The stable current local lead therefore remains confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask and cloud must remain closed.

why_lead: The current stable local lead keeps the same nearest_ring + geom_plus_raw input path, preserves the conf_depth-specific drop-worst + gradconfmask routing, and fixes the grad+conf confidence-weighting leak without changing camera, regression, or unproject routing.

On the tighter 10-train / 5-val local gate, it improves val_loss_conf_depth from 0.2514 to 0.2289 and val_loss_reg_depth from 0.1799 to 0.1760 versus confdepth_dropworst_only while keeping val_loss_T and val_loss_camera flat.
The narrower Camera_B1 bottom20 follow-up only won by a short-gate margin and then failed the 100-train / 20-val long gate, so no tested successor remains stable enough to replace this lead.

historical_stage_markers.name: nearest_rawpool
historical_stage_markers.note: Historical lead only. Do not treat this config as the current nightly lead.

accepted_findings.fact: Depth, confidence, regression, and unproject geometry supervision are already driven by batch point_masks, not by source-only raw views directly.
On the settled rawpool supervision audit, source-only raw views already have zero point pixels and zero camera/depth/unproject geometry-loss eligibility.
Camera supervision is now filtered at the frame level by real supervised point support, so source-only raw views no longer enter camera loss just because another frame in the sample is valid.
Depth loss now supports respect_conf_mask_in_grad_conf, so the grad+conf branch can stop confidence-weighting pixels that the conf_depth-specific routing already removed from conf supervision.

The confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask follow-up remains the current stable local lead: versus confdepth_dropworst_only on the tighter gate, val loss_conf_depth improves from 0.2514 to 0.2289 and val loss_reg_depth improves from 0.1799 to 0.1760 while val loss_T and val loss_camera stay flat.

Even after the gradconfmask fix, the current stable lead is still not baseline-clean: on val, loss_conf_depth stays higher than baseline (0.2289 vs 0.1181) and loss_reg_depth stays higher than baseline (0.1760 vs 0.1181).

The completed attribution v3 audit on the current gradconfmask lead keeps the same anchor-only conf_depth finding on the audited 32-sample val slice and narrows the only clearly positive camera-level conf_depth delta to anchor Camera_B1.

The broader whole-frame Camera_B1 conf-target scale-0.5 follow-up failed the tighter local gate: val loss_conf_depth regressed from 0.2289 to 0.3233 and val loss_reg_depth regressed from 0.1760 to 0.1901 versus the current stable gradconfmask lead.

Depth loss now also supports anchor_conditioned_conf_target_foreground_bottom_ratio, so anchor-conditioned conf-target scaling can be restricted to the foreground bottom band without changing camera, regression, or unproject routing.

The narrower train-only Camera_B1 foreground-bottom20 conf-target scale 0.5 candidate briefly cleared the 10-train / 5-val gate by a margin of 0.0002 on conf_depth and 0.0001 on reg_depth versus the current stable gradconfmask lead.

The same narrower B1-bottom20 candidate failed the stricter 100-train / 20-val long gate: versus confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask, val loss_camera worsened from 0.0498 to 0.0499, val loss_T from 0.0209 to 0.0210, val loss_conf_depth from -0.0577 to -0.0496, and val loss_reg_depth from 0.0911 to 0.0965.

A follow-up quality-signal audit on the same attribution slice shows that the remaining bad anchor is not just Camera_B1 in the abstract: within Camera_B1 anchor rows, cached quality_score correlates positively with worse delta conf_depth (r=0.6555), while non-B1 anchors remain net-improving, so the next bounded question is quality-conditioned conf-target normalization rather than another fixed B1 scale sibling.

ComposedDataset now forwards selection_anchor_quality_score into the training sample and normalizes missing selection_anchor_camera values to a collatable empty string, so quality-conditioned loss routing can consume cached anchor metadata without breaking DataLoader collation.
Batch repetition now duplicates selection_anchor_quality_score together with the tensor fields, so quality-conditioned candidates keep batch-aligned metadata under repeat_batch.

Depth loss now supports anchor_conditioned_conf_target_quality_min and anchor_conditioned_conf_target_quality_max, so quality-conditioned conf-target scaling can be bounded by cached anchor quality without changing camera, regression, or unproject routing.

Depth loss now also supports anchor_conditioned_conf_target_quality_interp with quality_low and quality_high, so continuous per-sample Camera_B1 quality-conditioned conf-target scaling can be tested without changing camera, regression, or unproject routing.

The first quality-conditioned candidate keeps camera/T flat but does not clear the promotion rule: on the tighter 10-train / 5-val gate, val loss_conf_depth only improves from 0.2288 to 0.2287 while val loss_reg_depth stays flat at 0.1759 versus the stable gradconfmask lead.

A postmortem on the rejected q>=3.0 candidate shows the hard threshold is over-selective: 4 / 10 bad Camera_B1 audit rows still sit below quality_min=3.0, and on the first 512 train samples the rule touches only 0.7476% of conf-depth-supervised pixels.

A follow-up quality-region boundary check shows both the hard threshold and the bottom20 region are over-selective: all 10 bad Camera_B1 audit rows keep positive non-bottom conf_depth deltas, while q>=3.0 + whole foreground covers 22.6975% of conf-depth-supervised pixels on a fresh 512-sample train slice versus only 0.7983% for q>=3.0 + bottom20.

A follow-up rule-shape sweep shows the next manual question should target a continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground quality-conditioned rule rather than a broader hard threshold: q>=3.0 whole foreground still omits 4 / 10 bad audit rows, q>=2.75 still omits 1 / 10, while a continuous qmin->qmax whole-foreground reference rule covers all 10 bad rows with an effective conf-depth reduction fraction of 5.1155% on a fresh 512-sample train slice.

The first exact continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground quality-conditioned candidate failed the tighter local gate: versus the stable gradconfmask lead, val loss_conf_depth regressed from 0.2289 to 0.2776 and val loss_reg_depth regressed from 0.1760 to 0.1848 even though val loss_camera only nudged from 0.0219 to 0.0218 and val loss_T stayed flat.

A softer continuous-rule sweep showed the best full-coverage fallback is linear_qmin_qmax_wholefg_scale075: it keeps all 10 bad Camera_B1 audit rows active while reducing the effective train-slice conf-depth reduction fraction from 5.9433% to 2.9716% relative to the rejected exact scale0.5 rule.

The first softer continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground candidate still failed the tighter local gate: versus the stable gradconfmask lead, val loss_conf_depth regressed from 0.2289 to 0.2483 and val loss_reg_depth regressed from 0.1760 to 0.1797 even though val loss_camera only nudged from 0.0219 to 0.0218 and val loss_T stayed flat.
The active_view_mean aggregation candidate is numerically redundant under the current 4-image recipe and does not create a new promotable lead.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: min_supervised_views_2
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Worse camera, translation, and unproject geometry than baseline.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: source_anchor_policy_max_depth_conf
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Worse objective, camera, translation, depth confidence, depth regression, and unproject geometry than baseline.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: dropworst_supervised
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Superseded by the narrower conf_depth-only route and never cleared the local promotion rule.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_trainmix50
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Reduced train-time rawpool exposure but sharply regressed camera, translation, conf_depth, reg_depth, unproject geometry, and objective versus the current lead.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_viewmean
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Numerically redundant under the current 4-image recipe.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_anchorb1confscale05
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: The broader whole-frame Camera_B1 scale-0.5 test failed the tighter gate: val_loss_conf_depth and val_loss_reg_depth both worsened versus the current stable gradconfmask lead, so this exact variant stays frozen.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_anchorb1bottom20confscale05
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Short-gate-only marginal win. On the stricter 100-train / 20-val long gate, val_loss_camera worsened by +0.0001, val_loss_T by +0.0001, val_loss_conf_depth by +0.0081, and val_loss_reg_depth by +0.0054 versus confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask, so this variant is frozen under the current question.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_anchorb1qge3bottom20confscale05
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: The first quality-conditioned candidate only nudged val_loss_conf_depth from 0.2288 to 0.2287 while leaving val_loss_reg_depth flat at 0.1759 and slightly worsening val_loss_objective. A follow-up postmortem also shows the hard q>=3.0 gate is over-selective, so this exact variant is frozen pending a fresh manual question.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_anchorb1qlinearwholefgconfscale05
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: The first exact continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground quality-conditioned rule failed the tighter gate: val_loss_conf_depth regressed from 0.2289 to 0.2776 and val_loss_reg_depth regressed from 0.1760 to 0.1848 versus the stable gradconfmask lead, so this exact linear qmin->qmax + scale0.5 variant is frozen.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_anchorb1qlinearwholefgconfscale075
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: The first softer continuous Camera_B1 whole-foreground rule also failed the tighter gate: val_loss_conf_depth regressed from 0.2289 to 0.2483 and val_loss_reg_depth regressed from 0.1760 to 0.1797 versus the stable gradconfmask lead, so this half-strength linear qmin->qmax + scale0.75 variant is frozen too.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: exclude_rawpool_only_supervision_standalone
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Already true on the current code path and therefore not a real candidate axis.

next_local_diagnostic.name: quality_continuous_soft_rule_sweep_v1
next_local_diagnostic.follow_up_status: Attribution v3, the long-gate demotion, the quality-signal audit, the hard-threshold postmortem, the boundary check, the rule-shape sweep, the softer continuous-rule sweep, and two local continuous candidates are now aligned: the fixed-scale Camera_B1 family is exhausted, the hard q>=3.0 + bottom20 rule is frozen as over-selective, bottom20 is too narrow, the exact whole-foreground linear qmin->qmax scale0.5 candidate failed the tighter gate, and the first softer half-strength scale0.75 candidate also failed. Default nightly therefore returns to steady_hold; any future manual question must justify an even softer or reshaped Camera_B1 quality-conditioned rule rather than reopening these exact whole-foreground variants.
next_local_diagnostic.goal: Record the rejected exact and first softer whole-foreground continuous candidates and define the threshold for any future manual quality-conditioned question.

non_goals: Do not reopen v10/v11 inference-side patch collection.
Do not reopen global zju_min_depth_conf sweeps.
Do not reopen reliable-region or bottom-only auxiliary unproject losses.
Do not restore the ghost stack.
Do not launch any cloud pair while the current local training axis is still unresolved.

nightly_modes.name: steady_hold
nightly_modes.when: No freshly approved local training question with one genuinely new candidate has been checked in since the previous night.
steps: Run preflight and require zero active Modal apps plus zero stale repo-scoped python/powershell/modal processes.
For steady_hold only, treat preflight as a guard-only cleanliness check rather than a cloud-launch memory gate.
Run consistency check and refresh the local status snapshot.
Do not rerun attribution v3 by default, do not train, and keep cloud_gate=false.

nightly_modes.name: single_candidate_local_gate
nightly_modes.when: Exactly one new local training-side candidate has been checked in, it is genuinely different from the frozen non-reentry list, and it follows the post-audit question boundary after the exhausted fixed-scale Camera_B1-conditioned family and the restoration of confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask as the stable local lead.
steps: Run the supervision audit on the candidate config only if its dataset or loss routing differs from the current lead.
Run one tighter local gate against baseline and the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead; do not branch into a second candidate the same night.
Promote only if camera/T do not materially rebound and conf_depth/reg_depth both improve versus the current lead.

rules: Run the machine-readable nightly runner in auto mode and require it to resolve to steady_hold only.
After each cycle, require consistency_check ok=true, current_lead_config to remain the stable confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead, cloud_gate=false, and launch_cloud_now=false.
Require zero active Modal apps and zero unexpected repo-scoped python/powershell/pwsh/modal processes after each cycle.

During sleep heartbeats, keep re-checking that current_lead_config still matches the stable confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead, there are zero active Modal apps, and there are zero unexpected repo-scoped python/powershell/pwsh/modal processes.

Keep latest_guard_snapshot.json updated so the last successful guard check remains visible even between full cycles, including consistency_ok, the current state lead, and the current state cloud flags.
Keep active_watch.json and latest_session.json updated while the watch is running so unattended progress is observable.
Do not auto-open single_candidate_local_gate from overnight watch; a fresh manual training question is still required.

promotion_requirements_before_cloud_cons: Keep val_loss_camera no materially worse than the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Keep val_loss_T no worse than the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Improve val_loss_conf_depth versus the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Improve val_loss_reg_depth versus the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Do not introduce new path, cache, or raw-image loading failures.
Even after a local pass, require a fresh manual decision before flipping cloud_gate.
